introSection: Wood Coaster is a wooden roller coaster currently standing but not operating at Knight Valley in Yantain, Shenzhen, Guangdong, China. It was built by Great Coasters International and opened on 19 July 2011. This is also GCI's second biggest coaster to date in real time. The ride has been closed since 2022.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: 2 trains with 12 cars per train. Riders are arranged 2 across in a single row for a total of 24 riders per train.

fullText:
Wood Coaster is a wooden roller coaster currently standing but not operating at Knight Valley in Yantain, Shenzhen, Guangdong, China. It was built by Great Coasters International and opened on 19 July 2011. This is also GCI's second biggest coaster to date in real time. The ride has been closed since 2022.



2 trains with 12 cars per train. Riders are arranged 2 across in a single row for a total of 24 riders per train.
